candidates.name: Email Template Variable Extractor
candidates.pitch: Scrapes common email template providers (Gmail, HubSpot, Outreach) to auto-extract {{variable}} patterns and categorize them. Simple text parsing with provider-specific DOM workarounds. Low competitio
candidates.pain: Sales ops teams manually count and categorize merge fields across dozens of email templates to build variable inventories.

candidates.name: API Response Time Benchmarker
candidates.pitch: Intercepts API calls and logs timing metrics, then displays a sortable table comparing endpoints across environments. Can tag requests with environment labels via URL patterns. Simple but fills a gap
candidates.pain: Backend developers comparing API latency across staging, QA, and production environments lack easy browser-side tooling.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: LinkedIn Employee Export
candidates.pitch: Extracts visible employee names, titles, and headcount from any LinkedIn company page into CSV/JSON. Buildable by DOM scraping LinkedIn's public pages. Demand spike from LinkedIn's increasingly restri
candidates.pain: Sales reps manually screenshot or copy-paste employee data from LinkedIn profiles to build account org charts.

candidates.name: Sitemap Health Monitor
candidates.pitch: Crawls a site's XML sitemap and checks every URL for HTTP errors, redirect chains, and missing meta tags. Simple to build with a background service worker crawler. Freemium for 100 pages monthly, paid
candidates.pain: SEO specialists lose ranking due to broken internal links, redirect chains, and missing canonical tags they only discover after drops.

candidates.name: Test Flakiness Tracker
candidates.pitch: Parses CI test output history from common CI providers to flag tests with rising failure variance. Buildable in 2-3 weeks by hooking into CI APIs and localizing pattern detection. The niche is narrow
candidates.pain: Developers waste hours debugging tests that fail randomly without understanding flakiness patterns or root causes.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GraphQL Field Usage Analyzer
candidates.pitch: Injects into GraphQL playground or intercepts network to build a field usage heatmap over time. Ship as a devtools panel that shows dead-field candidates. GraphQL ecosystem tooling is still fragmented
candidates.pain: GraphQL developers maintain resolver code for fields nobody queries, accumulating schema bloat and wasted backend work.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Cron Expression Visualizer
candidates.pitch: Highlights cron strings on any page and renders a human-readable timeline showing next 10 run times. Built with the popular cron-parser library and a custom timeline renderer. Small devtools utility w
candidates.pain: Developers misread cron expressions and schedule jobs to run at wrong times, causing data inconsistencies or missed SLAs.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Console Log Pattern Analyzer
candidates.pitch: Aggregates console output during development sessions and surfaces repeated patterns, grouping similar messages and surfacing anomalies. Buildable with console method interception and basic TF-IDF sim
candidates.pain: Frontend developers drowning in browser console noise struggle to find the 3 meaningful errors amid 200 routine logs.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link
